RegardsKim is an AI email customer support agent for Shopify stores.

It helps small and medium Shopify store owners handle repetitive support emails faster without losing control of the customer experience.

Core capabilities:
- Drafts replies to tracking questions, returns, refunds, exchanges, and general order support emails
- Uses live Shopify order, fulfillment, and tracking context to make responses accurate
- Keeps merchants in control by requiring review and approval before replies are sent
- Pricing starts at $49/mo
- Founding 100 offer: $24.50/mo forever for early merchants

Integration details:
- Installs as a Shopify app
- Connects to merchant email via Gmail OAuth
- Reads incoming support emails and prepares reply drafts inside the workflow

Best fit:
- Small to medium Shopify store owners
- Merchants spending too much time on customer support
- Stores that want faster email handling without hiring a support team yet
